```{r lib, include=F}
library(here)
source(file = here::here("functions/fun.R"))
f_load_libraries_colors()
col_Molecule <- rev(col_Molecule)
```

# Toxicokinetics of Epoxiconazole

## Results of the experiment

### Data importation

Notations :

-   `Date_start` : Start of the experiement (t0)
-   `Molecule` : Substance to which the earthworm is exposed
-   `Dose` : Exposure dose (mg/kg)
-   `ID_recipient` : Recipient in which the soil was prepared
-   `ID_camp` : ID of the earthworm campagne and generation (see XXX for more information)
-   `ID` : ID of the earthworm
-   `Nb_rep` : Identification number of the replicate
-   `Time_point` : Time point to which the earthworm is dedicated
-   `Phase` : Uptake or Elimination phase
-   `Time_introduction_D0` : Time of the day when the earthworm was introduced into his contaminated cosm
-   `w0` : Body weight at t0
-   `w_Tp` : Body weight at the given time point
-   `w_frozen` : Body weight before congelation
-   `C_worm` : Measured concentration of the substance in the earthworm
-   `C_soil` : Measured concentration of the substance in the soil at the given time point

```{r data, warning=F, message=F}

Levels_time_points <- c("0,25b", "1", "1b", "2", "3", "3b", as.character(seq(4,42,1)))


df_TK_EPX <- f_read_data_TK("EPX") %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ na_if(.x, -1)))


df_TK_EPX <- df_TK_EPX |> 
  mutate(
    Time = t,
    CiIMD = C_worm_IMD,
    CiEPX = C_worm_EPX,
    Weight = Weight_nog,
    Time_point_f = as.factor(Time_point)
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Time, CiEPX, CiIMD, Weight, w, Molecule, ID, expo, Time_point_f, Nb_rep, Experiment) |> 
  mutate(
    CiEPX = na_if(CiEPX, -1),
    CiIMD = na_if(CiIMD, -1)
    )|> 
  mutate(
    Time_point_f = fct_relevel(Time_point_f, Levels_time_points)
  )

df_TK_EPX_mean <- df_TK_EPX |> 
  dplyr::select(-ID) |> 
  group_by(Time) |> 
  summarise(
    CiEPX = exp(mean(log(CiEPX[CiEPX > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)),
    CiIMD = exp(mean(log(CiIMD[CiIMD > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)),
    Weight = mean(Weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    w = mean(w, na.rm = TRUE),
    expo = mean(expo),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  mutate(Molecule = "EPX")
```

### Initial state

```{r D0}
summary(subset(df_TK_EPX, Time==0 & Experiment == "TK"))
summary(subset(df_TK_EPX, Time==0 & Experiment == "TKBIS"))
```

```{r, warning=F, message=F}
#| fig-cap: Initial weights (with gut content) of earthworms. 
#| label: fig-init
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4

# Weights at t=0
plot_D0 <- ggplot(
  data=subset(df_TK_EPX, Time==0), 
  aes(
    x=Time_point_f, 
    y=w, 
    color=Molecule, 
    fill=Molecule
    )
  )+

  geom_boxplot(alpha=0.2)+
  geom_dotplot(
    binaxis='y', 
    stackdir='center', 
    dotsize=0.7, 
    alpha=0.7
    )+
  facet_wrap(~Molecule+Experiment, ncol=2, scales="free_x")+
  
  scale_color_manual(values=rev(col_Molecule))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=rev(col_Molecule))+

  labs(x="Dose (mg/kg)", y="Weight (mg)")+
  

  theme_classic(14)+
  theme(
    legend.position = "none", 
    legend.title=element_text(size=sizetitle-2,face="bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size=sizetitle-2,face="plain"),
    
    title=element_text(size=sizetitle, face="bold"), 
    
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size=sizetitle,face="plain"),
    
    axis.text.x = element_text(size=sizetitle-4),
    axis.line.x=element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
    
    
    strip.background = element_rect(
      color="black", 
      #fill=Nord_snow[3], 
      size=0, 
      linetype="solid"
      ),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
plot_D0
```

```{r saveinit, include=F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_initial_weights.png", 
  plot=plot_D0, 
  width=8, 
  height = 4, 
  path=here::here("fig/TK_single")
  )
```

### Growth curves

```{r, warning=F, message=F}
#| fig-cap: Evolution of earthworms body weight before and after fasting. 
#| label: fig-growthcurves
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8


col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4])
ID_tri <- c(1, 9, 17, 25, 33, 41, 49, 57, 65, 73, 81, 89, 97, 107, 115, 123, 131, 134, 137)

df_TK_EPX_plot <- df_TK_EPX |> 
  filter(!is.na(Weight))

y_segment <- 1.5

df_phases <- df_TK_EPX |> 
  filter(ID %in% ID_tri)|>
  arrange(Time_point_f, Time) |>
  group_by(Time_point_f) |>
  mutate(
    row = row_number(),
    t_start = Time,
    t_end = lead(Time),  
    segment = row,
    y = y_segment
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(t_end)) |>  
  dplyr::select(Time_point_f, segment, t_start, t_end, y, Experiment) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)),
    Phase = case_when(
      (segment == 1 & Time_point <= 21) ~ 1,
      (segment == 2 & Time_point <= 21) ~ 3,
      (segment == 1 & Time_point > 21) ~ 1,
      (segment == 2 & Time_point > 21) ~ 2,
      (segment == 3 & Time_point > 21) ~ 3,
      (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 1)~1,
      (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 2)~3
    )
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    Time_point_f = fct_relevel(Time_point_f, Levels_time_points)
  )


p_EPX <- ggplot() +
  
  geom_segment(
    data = df_phases,
    aes(
      x = t_start,
      xend = t_end,
      y = y,
      yend = y,
      color = factor(Phase)
    ),
    linewidth = 2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = df_TK_EPX_plot,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = w,
      group = ID
      ),
    alpha=1,
    color = col_EPX,
    linetype = "dashed"
    ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_TK_EPX,
    aes(
      x = Time,
      y = w,
      group = ID
      ),
    alpha=0.5,
    color = col_EPX
    ) +

  facet_wrap(~Time_point_f)+
  labs(
    title = "Growth Curves",
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Weight",
    color = ""
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure,
    label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"),
    name = "Phase"
    )+
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +  # Thème minimaliste
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.background = element_rect(
      color="black", 
      fill=Nord_snow[3], 
      size=0, 
      linetype="solid"
      ),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_EPX
```

```{r savegrowthcuves, include=F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_growth_curves.png", 
  plot=p_EPX, 
  width=8, 
  height = 4, 
  path=here::here("fig/TK_single")
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_growth_curves.svg", 
  plot=p_EPX, 
  width=8, 
  height = 4, 
  path=here::here("fig/TK_single")
  )
```

### Measured internal concentrations

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Measurements of EPX concentration in earthworms exposed to 10 mg/kg of EPX and related weight measurement of earthworms. Points represent the experimental data, the blue curve and the transparent blue band are produced with geom_smooth. 
#| fig-label: fig-curvesmooth
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4

p <- ggplot(
  data = df_TK_EPX |> filter(Time!=0 & !is.na(CiEPX)),
  aes(
    x = Time
  )
  )+
  geom_point(
    mapping = aes(
      y = CiEPX,
    color = Experiment,
    fill = Experiment
    )
  )+
  facet_wrap(~Molecule, ncol = 2, scales = "free")+
  scale_color_manual(values = c(col_EPX, Nord_aurora[4]))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(col_EPX, Nord_aurora[4]))+
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Concentration in earthworm (ng/g)"
  )+
  #lims(x=c(0,5))+
  theme_minimal()
p
```

## Modeling of the toxicokinetics

Names of models :

-   C1 : One compartement only.
-   C1P : One compartment and exposure in Petri dishes via gut content.
-   C2 : Two compartements.
-   C2P : Two compartments and exposure in Petri dishes via gut content.

### In files creation for MCMC

```{r increation, message=F, warning=F}
#| code-show: show

Molecule <- "EPX"

########## C1 ################################################################

path_mod_EPX_C1 <- here::here("mod/TK_EPX_C1")
path_fig_C1 <- here::here("fig/TK_single/EPX_C1/")

Nb_Iter <- 100000
seeds <- c(C1 = 3333, C2 = 6656, C3 = 111222)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuEPX,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 10000); # min, max 
Distrib(keEPX,    LogUniform,   0.00001, 10000); # min, max

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.005,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiEPX, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiEPX,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiEPX),  Sigma_CiEPX);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_EPX_C1, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

########## C1P ################################################################

path_mod_EPX_C1P <- here::here("mod/TK_EPX_C1P")
path_fig_C1P <- here::here("fig/TK_single/EPX_C1P/")

Nb_Iter <- 300000
seeds <- c(C1 = 333266, C2 = 660660, C3 = 110110) # Done on CEA servers (CCRT)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuEPX,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keEPX,    LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(phi,     Uniform,   0.0, 1); # min, max

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.005,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiEPX, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiEPX,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiEPX),  Sigma_CiEPX);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_EPX_C1P, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

########## C2 ################################################################

Molecule <- "EPX"
path_mod_EPX_C2 <- here::here("mod/TK_EPX_C2")
path_fig_C2 <- here::here("fig/TK_single/EPX_C2/")

Nb_Iter <- 100000
seeds <- c(C1 = 33033, C2 = 6666, C3 = 1201)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuEPX,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keEPX,    LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(kperiph,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max 

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.005,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiEPX, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiEPX,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiEPX),  Sigma_CiEPX);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_EPX_C2, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

########## C2P ################################################################

path_mod_EPX_C2P <- here::here("mod/TK_EPX_C2P")
path_fig_C2P <- here::here("fig/TK_single/EPX_C2P/")

Nb_Iter <- 300000
seeds <- c(C1 = 333266, C2 = 660660, C3 = 110110) # Done on CEA servers (CCRT)

text_priors <- "Distrib(kuEPX,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max 
Distrib(keEPX,    LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max

Distrib(kperiph,     LogUniform,   0.00001, 100000); # min, max
Distrib(phi,     Uniform,   0.0, 1); # min, max

Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal,   0.005,   0.005,    -0.5,    1); # mean, sd, min, max
Distrib (Vr_a_growth,  TruncNormal, 0.0015, 0.01, 0, 1);

Distrib(Sigma_W,     TruncNormal,  0.03, 0.01, 0.0001, 1);
Distrib(Sigma_CiEPX, TruncNormal,  3.0, 3.0,    1, 1000);"

text_likelihood <- "Likelihood(CiEPX,  LogNormal, Prediction(CiEPX),  Sigma_CiEPX);  # Calcul des vraisemblances (geometric mean, geometric standard deviation)
Likelihood(Weight, Normal,    Prediction(Weight), Sigma_W);      # Calcul des vraisemblances"

text_param_ind <- "Distrib(a_growth,  TruncNormal, a_growth,  Vr_a_growth, -1.0, 1);"

f_In_tot(path_mod_EPX_C2P, Molecule, text_priors, text_likelihood, text_param_ind, Nb_Iter, seeds)

# ./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_C1.in
```

An example of how to run the models MCMC is given in the bash code block below. You need to be in the right folder to launch a given model.

```{bash, eval=F, execute=F}
pwd
cd ..
cd ..
cd mod/TK_EPX
pwd

makemcsim m_TK_EPX.model &
for j in $(seq 1 3); do
./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_C${j}.in
done
```

The first step is to retrieve the information of the MCMC simulation experiments.

The inputs :

-   Input files must a name like "xxxxx.1.in"
-   Output files must a name like "xxxxx.1.out"

### Get MCMC results

```{r EPXreadMCMC, message=F, warning=F, results='hidden'}

########## C1 ################################################################

MCMC_out_EPX_C1 <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_EPX_C1)

NC_C1 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$NC
Nb_param_C1 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C1 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C1 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C1 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C1 <- unique(MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Priors$Nom)

########## C1P ################################################################

MCMC_out_EPX_C1P <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_EPX_C1P)

NC_C1P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$NC
Nb_param_C1P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C1P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C1P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C1P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C1P <- unique(MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Priors$Nom)

########## C2 ################################################################

MCMC_out_EPX_C2 <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_EPX_C2)

NC_C2 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$NC
Nb_param_C2 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C2 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C2 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C2 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C2 <- unique(MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Priors$Nom)

########## C2P ################################################################

MCMC_out_EPX_C2P <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_EPX_C2P)

NC_C2P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$NC
Nb_param_C2P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Nb_param
Nb_experiment_C2P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Nb_experiment
Nb_iter_kept_C2P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Nb_iter_kept
N_iter_setpoint_C2P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$N_iter_setpoint
L_parameters_C2P <- unique(MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Priors$Nom)

```

We can retrieve different information from the models :

-   C1
    -   The number of chains used : `r NC_C1`
    -   The number of parameters : `r Nb_param_C1`
    -   The number of experiments : `r Nb_experiment_C1`
    -   The number of last iterations used to describe the posterior distribution : `r Nb_iter_kept_C1`
    -   The number of last iterations used to create the `tab_setpoint.out` file : `r N_iter_setpoint_C1`
-   C1P
    -   The number of parameters : `r Nb_param_C1P`
-   C2
    -   The number of parameters : `r Nb_param_C2`
-   C2P
    -   The number of parameters : `r Nb_param_C2P`

### Priors used for the model

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r EPXreadpriorsC1, message = F, warning = F}
#| tbl-cap: Priors used for the model
#| tbl-label: tbl-EPXPriorsC1

colnames(MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Priors) <- c("Nom", "Distribution", "P1", "P2", "P3", "P4")

MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Priors |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )

#MCMC_out_EPX$Priors
```

```{r EPXpriorsC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Distributions of the priors.
#| label: fig-EPXpriorC1
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 8

n_samples <- 1e6 # Simulation of the distribution
col_prior <- Nord_polar[4]
alpha_prior <- 0.5

df_priors_dist_C1 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Priors |> 
  dplyr::select(Nom, Distribution, P1, P2, P3, P4) |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(samples = case_when(
    Distribution == "Uniform" ~ list(runif(n_samples, min = P1, max = P2)),
    Distribution == "Normal" ~ list(rnorm(n_samples, mean = P1, sd = P2)),
    Distribution == "LogUniform" ~ list(exp(runif(n_samples, min = log(P1), max = log(P2)))),
    Distribution == "TruncNormal" ~ list(rtruncnorm(n_samples, a = P3, b = P4, mean = P1, sd = P2))
  )) |> 
  unnest(samples) |> 
  filter(!(Nom %in% c("kuEPX", "keEPX","kcomp_in", "kcomp_out") & samples > 0.01))

p_priors <- ggplot() +
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C1, 
    aes(
       x = samples
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy" 
    ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Priors distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_priors 

```

```{r savepriorC1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_priors.png", 
  plot=p_priors, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_priors.svg", 
  plot=p_priors, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
```

## C1P

```{r EPXreadpriorsC1P, message = F, warning = F}
#| tbl-cap: Priors used for the model
#| tbl-label: tbl-EPXPriorsC1P

colnames(MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Priors) <- c("Nom", "Distribution", "P1", "P2", "P3", "P4")

MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Priors |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )

#MCMC_out_EPX$Priors
```

```{r EPXpriorsC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Distributions of the priors.
#| label: fig-EPXpriorC1P
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 8

n_samples <- 1e6 # Simulation of the distribution
col_prior <- Nord_polar[4]
alpha_prior <- 0.5

df_priors_dist_C1P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Priors |> 
  dplyr::select(Nom, Distribution, P1, P2, P3, P4) |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(samples = case_when(
    Distribution == "Uniform" ~ list(runif(n_samples, min = P1, max = P2)),
    Distribution == "Normal" ~ list(rnorm(n_samples, mean = P1, sd = P2)),
    Distribution == "LogUniform" ~ list(exp(runif(n_samples, min = log(P1), max = log(P2)))),
    Distribution == "TruncNormal" ~ list(rtruncnorm(n_samples, a = P3, b = P4, mean = P1, sd = P2))
  )) |> 
  unnest(samples) |> 
  filter(!(Nom %in% c("kuEPX", "keEPX","kcomp_in", "kcomp_out") & samples > 0.01))

p_priors <- ggplot() +
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C1P, 
    aes(
       x = samples
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy" 
    ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Priors distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_priors 

```

```{r savepriorC1P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_priors.png", 
  plot=p_priors, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_priors.svg", 
  plot=p_priors, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
```

## C2

```{r EPXreadpriorsC2, message = F, warning = F}
#| tbl-cap: Priors used for the model
#| tbl-label: tbl-EPXPriorsC2

colnames(MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Priors) <- c("Nom", "Distribution", "P1", "P2", "P3", "P4")

MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Priors |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )

#MCMC_out_EPX$Priors
```

```{r EPXpriorsC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Distributions of the priors.
#| label: fig-EPXpriorC2
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 8

n_samples <- 1e6 # Simulation of the distribution
col_prior <- Nord_polar[4]
alpha_prior <- 0.5

df_priors_dist_C2 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Priors |> 
  dplyr::select(Nom, Distribution, P1, P2, P3, P4) |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(samples = case_when(
    Distribution == "Uniform" ~ list(runif(n_samples, min = P1, max = P2)),
    Distribution == "Normal" ~ list(rnorm(n_samples, mean = P1, sd = P2)),
    Distribution == "LogUniform" ~ list(exp(runif(n_samples, min = log(P1), max = log(P2)))),
    Distribution == "TruncNormal" ~ list(rtruncnorm(n_samples, a = P3, b = P4, mean = P1, sd = P2))
  )) |> 
  unnest(samples) |> 
  filter(!(Nom %in% c("kuEPX", "keEPX","kcomp_in", "kcomp_out") & samples > 0.01))

p_priors <- ggplot() +
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C2, 
    aes(
       x = samples
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy" 
    ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Priors distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_priors 

```

```{r savepriorC2, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_priors.png", 
  plot=p_priors, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C2
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_priors.svg", 
  plot=p_priors, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C2
  )
```

## C2P

```{r EPXreadpriorsC2P, message = F, warning = F}
#| tbl-cap: Priors used for the model
#| tbl-label: tbl-EPXPriorsC2P

colnames(MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Priors) <- c("Nom", "Distribution", "P1", "P2", "P3", "P4")

MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Priors |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )

#MCMC_out_EPX$Priors
```

```{r EPXpriorsC2P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Distributions of the priors.
#| label: fig-EPXpriorC2P
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 8

n_samples <- 1e6 # Simulation of the distribution
col_prior <- Nord_polar[4]
alpha_prior <- 0.5

df_priors_dist_C2P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Priors |> 
  dplyr::select(Nom, Distribution, P1, P2, P3, P4) |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(samples = case_when(
    Distribution == "Uniform" ~ list(runif(n_samples, min = P1, max = P2)),
    Distribution == "Normal" ~ list(rnorm(n_samples, mean = P1, sd = P2)),
    Distribution == "LogUniform" ~ list(exp(runif(n_samples, min = log(P1), max = log(P2)))),
    Distribution == "TruncNormal" ~ list(rtruncnorm(n_samples, a = P3, b = P4, mean = P1, sd = P2))
  )) |> 
  unnest(samples) |> 
  filter(!(Nom %in% c("kuEPX", "keEPX","kcomp_in", "kcomp_out") & samples > 0.01))

p_priors <- ggplot() +
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C2P, 
    aes(
       x = samples
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy" 
    ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Priors distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_priors 

```

```{r savepriorC2P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_priors.png", 
  plot=p_priors, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_priors.svg", 
  plot=p_priors, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
```
:::

### Chains

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r EPXChainsC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Parameters chains. Only the first iteration and the last `r Nb_iter_kept` are represented.
#| label: fig-EPXchainsC1
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 8

p_chains <-  
  ggplot(
    data = MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains |> filter(Iteration > 1), 
    aes(
      x = Iteration, 
      y = value, 
      color = as.factor(Chain), 
      group = as.factor(Chain)
      )
  )+
  geom_line(alpha=0.7)+
  scale_y_log10()+
  facet_wrap(~Parameter, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+
  
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", values = nord(palette = "frost"))+
  
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "right", 
    title=element_text(size=12, face="plain"), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face="plain"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill="white")
    )

p_chains
  
```

```{r savechainsC1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_chains.png", 
  plot=p_chains, 
  width=8, height = 5, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_chains.svg", 
  plot=p_chains, 
  width=8, height = 5, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
```

## C1P

```{r EPXChainsC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Parameters chains. Only the first iteration and the last `r Nb_iter_kept` are represented.
#| label: fig-EPXchainsC1P
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 8

p_chains <-  
  ggplot(
    data = MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains|> filter(Iteration > 1), 
    aes(
      x = Iteration, 
      y = value, 
      color = as.factor(Chain), 
      group = as.factor(Chain)
      )
  )+
  geom_line(alpha=0.7)+
  scale_y_log10()+
  facet_wrap(~Parameter, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+
  
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", values = nord(palette = "frost"))+
  
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "right", 
    title=element_text(size=12, face="plain"), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face="plain"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill="white")
    )

p_chains
  
```

```{r savechainsC1P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_chains.png", 
  plot=p_chains, 
  width=8, height = 5, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_chains.svg", 
  plot=p_chains, 
  width=8, height = 5, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
```

## C2

```{r EPXChainsC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Parameters chains. Only the first iteration and the last `r Nb_iter_kept` are represented.
#| label: fig-EPXchainsC2
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 8

p_chains <-  
  ggplot(
    data = MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains|> filter(Iteration > 1), 
    aes(
      x = Iteration, 
      y = value, 
      color = as.factor(Chain), 
      group = as.factor(Chain)
      )
  )+
  geom_line(alpha=0.7)+
  scale_y_log10()+
  facet_wrap(~Parameter, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+
  
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", values = nord(palette = "frost"))+
  
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "right", 
    title=element_text(size=12, face="plain"), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face="plain"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill="white")
    )

p_chains
  
```

```{r savechainsC2, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_chains.png", 
  plot=p_chains, 
  width=8, height = 5, 
  path=path_fig_C2
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_chains.svg", 
  plot=p_chains, 
  width=8, height = 5, 
  path=path_fig_C2
  )
```

## C2P

```{r EPXChainsC2P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Parameters chains. Only the first iteration and the last `r Nb_iter_kept` are represented.
#| label: fig-EPXchainsC2P
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 8

p_chains <-  
  ggplot(
    data = MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains|> filter(Iteration > 1), 
    aes(
      x = Iteration, 
      y = value, 
      color = as.factor(Chain), 
      group = as.factor(Chain)
      )
  )+
  geom_line(alpha=0.7)+
  scale_y_log10()+
  facet_wrap(~Parameter, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+
  
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", values = nord(palette = "frost"))+
  
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    legend.position = "right", 
    title=element_text(size=12, face="plain"), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face="plain"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill="white")
    )

p_chains
  
```

```{r savechainsC2P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_chains.png", 
  plot=p_chains, 
  width=8, height = 5, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_chains.svg", 
  plot=p_chains, 
  width=8, height = 5, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
```
:::

We can also take a look at the likelihood and the deviance ratio.

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r EPXlikeC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Evolution of likelihood and deviance ratio through the iterations.
#| label: fig-EPXlikeC1
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

p1 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C1$df_LnPost_start, 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = "First half iterations", 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C1$df_LnPost |> filter(iteration > 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p3 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C1$df_Devc|> filter(iteration > 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = RatioDeviance, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "Ratio Deviance"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_LL <- p1 + p2 + p3 +
  plot_layout(ncol=3, guides = "collect")
p_LL

```

```{r saveEPXlikeC1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_likedevratio.png", 
  plot=p_LL, 
  width=8, height = 4, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_likedevratio.svg", 
  plot=p_LL, 
  width=8, height = 4, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
```

## C1P

```{r EPXlikeC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Evolution of likelihood and deviance ratio through the iterations.
#| label: fig-EPXlikeC1P
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

p1 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$df_LnPost_start, 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = "First half iterations", 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$df_LnPost |> filter(iteration > 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p3 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$df_Devc |> filter(iteration > 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = RatioDeviance, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "Ratio Deviance"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_LL <- p1 + p2 + p3 +
  plot_layout(ncol=3, guides = "collect")
p_LL

```

```{r saveEPXlikeC1P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_likedevratio.png", 
  plot=p_LL, 
  width=8, height = 4, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_likedevratio.svg", 
  plot=p_LL, 
  width=8, height = 4, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
```

## C2

```{r EPXlikeC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Evolution of likelihood and deviance ratio through the iterations.
#| label: fig-EPXlikeC2
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

p1 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C2$df_LnPost_start, 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = "First half iterations", 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C2$df_LnPost |> filter(iteration > 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p3 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C2$df_Devc |> filter(iteration > 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = RatioDeviance, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "Ratio Deviance"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_LL <- p1 + p2 + p3 +
  plot_layout(ncol=3, guides = "collect")
p_LL

```

```{r saveEPXlikeC2, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_likedevratio.png", 
  plot=p_LL, 
  width=8, height = 4, 
  path=path_fig_C2
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_likedevratio.svg", 
  plot=p_LL, 
  width=8, height = 4, 
  path=path_fig_C2
  )
```

## C2P

```{r EPXlikeC2P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Evolution of likelihood and deviance ratio through the iterations.
#| label: fig-EPXlikeC2P
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

p1 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$df_LnPost_start, 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = "First half iterations", 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$df_LnPost |> filter(iteration > 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = LnPosterior, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "LnPosterior"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p3 <- ggplot(
  MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$df_Devc |> filter(iteration > 1), 
  aes(
    x = iteration, 
    y = RatioDeviance, 
    color = Chain
    )
  ) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) +
  labs(
    x = paste(MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), 
    y = "Ratio Deviance"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_LL <- p1 + p2 + p3 +
  plot_layout(ncol=3, guides = "collect")
p_LL

```

```{r saveEPXlikeC2P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_likedevratio.png", 
  plot=p_LL, 
  width=8, height = 4, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_likedevratio.svg", 
  plot=p_LL, 
  width=8, height = 4, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
```
:::

```{r mcmclist, message=F, warning=F}
# Large format per chain
mcmc_list_C1 <- lapply(split(MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains, MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains$Chain), function(d) {
  wide <- d %>%
    dplyr::select(Iteration, Parameter, value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Parameter, values_from = value) %>%
    arrange(Iteration)
  
  mcmc(as.matrix(wide[,-1]))
})
mcmc_list_C1 <- as.mcmc.list(mcmc_list_C1)

mcmc_list_C1P <- lapply(split(MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains, MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains$Chain), function(d) {
  wide <- d %>%
    dplyr::select(Iteration, Parameter, value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Parameter, values_from = value) %>%
    arrange(Iteration)
  
  mcmc(as.matrix(wide[,-1]))
})
mcmc_list_C1P <- as.mcmc.list(mcmc_list_C1P)

mcmc_list_C2 <- lapply(split(MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains, MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains$Chain), function(d) {
  wide <- d %>%
    dplyr::select(Iteration, Parameter, value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Parameter, values_from = value) %>%
    arrange(Iteration)
  
  mcmc(as.matrix(wide[,-1]))
})
mcmc_list_C2 <- as.mcmc.list(mcmc_list_C2)

mcmc_list_C2P <- lapply(split(MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains, MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains$Chain), function(d) {
  wide <- d %>%
    dplyr::select(Iteration, Parameter, value) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Parameter, values_from = value) %>%
    arrange(Iteration)
  
  mcmc(as.matrix(wide[,-1]))
})
mcmc_list_C2P <- as.mcmc.list(mcmc_list_C2P)

```

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r}
#| fig-cap: Chains convergence.
#| label: fig-EPXchainsconvergenceC1
#| fig-height: 8
#| fig-width: 8

  par(mfrow=c(1,3))

  gelman.plot(mcmc_list_C1,
            bin.width = 10,      # Number of observations per segment,
            # first segment --> at least 50 iterations.
            max.bins = 50,       # Maximum number of bins, excluding the last one
            confidence = 0.95,   # Coverage probability of confidence interval.
            transform = FALSE,   # improve the normality of the distribution
            autoburnin=TRUE)     # Remove first half of sequence

  
  gelman <- gelman.diag(mcmc_list_C1, confidence = 0.95, transform=FALSE, autoburnin=TRUE, multivariate=TRUE)
  print(gelman)
```

## C1P

```{r}
#| fig-cap: Chains convergence.
#| label: fig-EPXchainsconvergenceC1P
#| fig-height: 8
#| fig-width: 8

  par(mfrow=c(1,3))

  gelman.plot(mcmc_list_C1P,
            bin.width = 10,      # Number of observations per segment,
            # first segment --> at least 50 iterations.
            max.bins = 50,       # Maximum number of bins, excluding the last one
            confidence = 0.95,   # Coverage probability of confidence interval.
            transform = FALSE,   # improve the normality of the distribution
            autoburnin=TRUE)     # Remove first half of sequence

  
  gelman <- gelman.diag(mcmc_list_C1P, confidence = 0.95, transform=FALSE, autoburnin=TRUE, multivariate=TRUE)
  print(gelman)
```

## C2

```{r}
#| fig-cap: Chains convergence.
#| label: fig-EPXchainsconvergenceC2
#| fig-height: 8
#| fig-width: 8

  par(mfrow=c(1,3))

  gelman.plot(mcmc_list_C2,
            bin.width = 10,      # Number of observations per segment,
            # first segment --> at least 50 iterations.
            max.bins = 50,       # Maximum number of bins, excluding the last one
            confidence = 0.95,   # Coverage probability of confidence interval.
            transform = FALSE,   # improve the normality of the distribution
            autoburnin=TRUE)     # Remove first half of sequence

  
  gelman <- gelman.diag(mcmc_list_C2, confidence = 0.95, transform=FALSE, autoburnin=TRUE, multivariate=TRUE)
  print(gelman)
```

## C2P

```{r}
#| fig-cap: Chains convergence.
#| label: fig-EPXchainsconvergenceC2P
#| fig-height: 8
#| fig-width: 8

  par(mfrow=c(1,3))

  gelman.plot(mcmc_list_C2P,
            bin.width = 10,      # Number of observations per segment,
            # first segment --> at least 50 iterations.
            max.bins = 50,       # Maximum number of bins, excluding the last one
            confidence = 0.95,   # Coverage probability of confidence interval.
            transform = FALSE,   # improve the normality of the distribution
            autoburnin=TRUE)     # Remove first half of sequence

  
  gelman <- gelman.diag(mcmc_list_C2P, confidence = 0.95, transform=FALSE, autoburnin=TRUE, multivariate=TRUE)
  print(gelman)
```
:::

Chains converged.

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r corr, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Parameter correlations.
#| label: fig-corrC1
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 6

mcmc_list_corr <- mcmc.list(
  lapply(mcmc_list_C1, function(x) {
    mcmc(as.matrix(x)[-1, , drop = FALSE])  # <- reconvertir en mcmc
  })
)

colramp_aurora <- colorRampPalette(rev(Nord_aurora[1:4]))
ipairs(as.matrix(mcmc_list_corr), colramp = colramp_aurora, pixs=0.25, cex.diag = 0.5)
```

## C1P

```{r corr, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Parameter correlations.
#| label: fig-corrC1P
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 6

mcmc_list_corr <- mcmc.list(
  lapply(mcmc_list_C1P, function(x) {
    mcmc(as.matrix(x)[-1, , drop = FALSE])  # <- reconvertir en mcmc
  })
)

colramp_aurora <- colorRampPalette(rev(Nord_aurora[1:4]))
ipairs(as.matrix(mcmc_list_corr), colramp = colramp_aurora, pixs=0.25, cex.diag = 0.5)
```

## C2

```{r corr, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Parameter correlations.
#| label: fig-corrC2
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 6

mcmc_list_corr <- mcmc.list(
  lapply(mcmc_list_C2, function(x) {
    mcmc(as.matrix(x)[-1, , drop = FALSE])  # <- reconvertir en mcmc
  })
)

colramp_aurora <- colorRampPalette(rev(Nord_aurora[1:4]))
ipairs(as.matrix(mcmc_list_corr), colramp = colramp_aurora, pixs=0.25, cex.diag = 0.5)
```

## C2P

```{r corr, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Parameter correlations.
#| label: fig-corrC2P
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 6

mcmc_list_corr <- mcmc.list(
  lapply(mcmc_list_C2P, function(x) {
    mcmc(as.matrix(x)[-1, , drop = FALSE])  # <- reconvertir en mcmc
  })
)

colramp_aurora <- colorRampPalette(rev(Nord_aurora[1:4]))
ipairs(as.matrix(mcmc_list_corr), colramp = colramp_aurora, pixs=0.25, cex.diag = 0.5)
```
:::

### Parameter estimation results

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r EPXpost, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Distributions of the priors and the posteriors.
#| label: fig-EPXpostC1
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 8

alpha_prior <- 0.5
alpha_post <- 0.5
col_prior <- Nord_snow[1]
col_post <- col_EPX


MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains_plot <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) |> 
  filter(!((Nom %in% c("kcomp_in","kcomp_out") & value > 0.02)))|> 
  filter(!((Nom %in% c("kuEPX") & value > 5)))

p_post <- ggplot() +
  
  # Priors
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C1,
    aes(
       x = samples,
       #y = ..scaled..
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy"
    ) +
  
  # Posterior
  stat_halfeye(
    data = subset(MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains_plot, Nom %in% L_parameters_C1),
    mapping = aes(
      x=value
    ),
    fill = col_post,
    color = col_post,
    alpha = alpha_post,
    normalize = "xy"
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  labs(
    title = "Posterior and prior distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    title=element_markdown(face="bold")
  )

p_post
```

```{r savepostC1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_post.png", 
  plot=p_post, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_post.svg", 
  plot=p_post, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C1
  )
```

## C1P

```{r EPXpost, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Distributions of the priors and the posteriors.
#| label: fig-EPXpostC1P
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 8

alpha_prior <- 0.5
alpha_post <- 0.5
col_prior <- Nord_snow[1]
col_post <- col_EPX


MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains_plot <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) |> 
  filter(!((Nom %in% c("kcomp_in","kcomp_out") & value > 0.02)))|> 
  filter(!((Nom %in% c("kuEPX") & value > 5)))

p_post <- ggplot() +
  
  # Priors
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C1P,
    aes(
       x = samples,
       #y = ..scaled..
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy"
    ) +
  
  # Posterior
  stat_halfeye(
    data = subset(MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains_plot, Nom %in% L_parameters_C1P),
    mapping = aes(
      x=value
    ),
    fill = col_post,
    color = col_post,
    alpha = alpha_post,
    normalize = "xy"
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  labs(
    title = "Posterior and prior distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    title=element_markdown(face="bold")
  )

p_post
```

```{r savepostC1P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_post.png", 
  plot=p_post, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_post.svg", 
  plot=p_post, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C1P
  )
```

## C2

```{r EPXpost, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Distributions of the priors and the posteriors.
#| label: fig-EPXpostC2
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 8

alpha_prior <- 0.5
alpha_post <- 0.5
col_prior <- Nord_snow[1]
col_post <- col_EPX


MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains_plot <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) |> 
  filter(!((Nom %in% c("kcomp_in","kcomp_out") & value > 0.02)))|> 
  filter(!((Nom %in% c("kuEPX") & value > 5)))

p_post <- ggplot() +
  
  # Priors
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C2,
    aes(
       x = samples,
       #y = ..scaled..
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy"
    ) +
  
  # Posterior
  stat_halfeye(
    data = subset(MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains_plot, Nom %in% L_parameters_C2),
    mapping = aes(
      x=value
    ),
    fill = col_post,
    color = col_post,
    alpha = alpha_post,
    normalize = "xy"
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  labs(
    title = "Posterior and prior distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    title=element_markdown(face="bold")
  )

p_post
```

```{r savepostC2, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_post.png", 
  plot=p_post, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C2
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_post.svg", 
  plot=p_post, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C2
  )
```

## C2P

```{r EPXpost, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Distributions of the priors and the posteriors.
#| label: fig-EPXpostC2P
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 8

alpha_prior <- 0.5
alpha_post <- 0.5
col_prior <- Nord_snow[1]
col_post <- col_EPX


MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains_plot <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) |> 
  filter(!((Nom %in% c("kcomp_in","kcomp_out") & value > 0.02)))|> 
  filter(!((Nom %in% c("kuEPX") & value > 5)))

p_post <- ggplot() +
  
  # Priors
  stat_halfeye(
    data = df_priors_dist_C2P,
    aes(
       x = samples,
       #y = ..scaled..
       ),
    alpha = alpha_prior,
    fill = col_prior,
    color = col_prior,
    normalize = "xy"
    ) +
  
  # Posterior
  stat_halfeye(
    data = subset(MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains_plot, Nom %in% L_parameters_C2P),
    mapping = aes(
      x=value
    ),
    fill = col_post,
    color = col_post,
    alpha = alpha_post,
    normalize = "xy"
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+
  labs(
    title = "Posterior and prior distributions", 
    x = "Parameter value", 
    y = "Density"
    ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    title=element_markdown(face="bold")
  )

p_post
```

```{r savepostC2P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_post.png", 
  plot=p_post, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
ggsave(
  filename="TK_EPX_post.svg", 
  plot=p_post, 
  width=8, height = 6, 
  path=path_fig_C2P
  )
```
:::

```{r calcBCFEPX, message=F, warning=F}

f_get_mode <- function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

########## C1 #######################################################

MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$"))

ku_samples_C1 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuEPX")
ke_samples_C1 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keEPX")

BCF_samples_C1 <- ku_samples_C1$value / ke_samples_C1$value

BCF_mode_C1 <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C1)
BCF_CI_C1 <- quantile(BCF_samples_C1, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C1 <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1[1])
BCF_CI_up_C1 <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1[2])
BCF_min_C1 <- min(BCF_samples_C1)
BCF_max_C1 <- max(BCF_samples_C1)
BCF_mean_C1 <- mean(BCF_samples_C1)
BCF_sd_C1 <- sd(BCF_samples_C1)

BCF_C1 <- c(
  BCF_mode_C1, 
  BCF_CI_low_C1, BCF_CI_up_C1, 
  BCF_min_C1, BCF_max_C1, 
  BCF_mean_C1, BCF_sd_C1
  )

########## C1P #######################################################

MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$"))

ku_samples_C1P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuEPX")
ke_samples_C1P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keEPX")

BCF_samples_C1P <- ku_samples_C1P$value / ke_samples_C1P$value

BCF_mode_C1P <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C1P)
BCF_CI_C1P <- quantile(BCF_samples_C1P, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C1P <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1P[1])
BCF_CI_up_C1P <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C1P[2])
BCF_min_C1P <- min(BCF_samples_C1P)
BCF_max_C1P <- max(BCF_samples_C1P)
BCF_mean_C1P <- mean(BCF_samples_C1P)
BCF_sd_C1P <- sd(BCF_samples_C1P)

BCF_C1P <- c(
  BCF_mode_C1P, 
  BCF_CI_low_C1P, BCF_CI_up_C1P, 
  BCF_min_C1P, BCF_max_C1P, 
  BCF_mean_C1P, BCF_sd_C1P
  )

########## C2 #######################################################

MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$"))

ku_samples_C2 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuEPX")
ke_samples_C2 <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keEPX")

BCF_samples_C2 <- ku_samples_C2$value / ke_samples_C2$value

BCF_mode_C2 <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C2)
BCF_CI_C2 <- quantile(BCF_samples_C2, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C2 <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2[1])
BCF_CI_up_C2 <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2[2])
BCF_min_C2 <- min(BCF_samples_C2)
BCF_max_C2 <- max(BCF_samples_C2)
BCF_mean_C2 <- mean(BCF_samples_C2)
BCF_sd_C2 <- sd(BCF_samples_C2)

BCF_C2 <- c(
  BCF_mode_C2, 
  BCF_CI_low_C2, BCF_CI_up_C2, 
  BCF_min_C2, BCF_max_C2, 
  BCF_mean_C2, BCF_sd_C2
  )

########## C2P #######################################################

MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains |> 
  mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$"))

ku_samples_C2P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuEPX")
ke_samples_C2P <- MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keEPX")

BCF_samples_C2P <- ku_samples_C2P$value / ke_samples_C2P$value

BCF_mode_C2P <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples_C2P)
BCF_CI_C2P <- quantile(BCF_samples_C2P, probs = c(0.025, 0.975))
BCF_CI_low_C2P <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2P[1])
BCF_CI_up_C2P <- as.numeric(BCF_CI_C2P[2])
BCF_min_C2P <- min(BCF_samples_C2P)
BCF_max_C2P <- max(BCF_samples_C2P)
BCF_mean_C2P <- mean(BCF_samples_C2P)
BCF_sd_C2P <- sd(BCF_samples_C2P)

BCF_C2P <- c(
  BCF_mode_C2P, 
  BCF_CI_low_C2P, BCF_CI_up_C2P, 
  BCF_min_C2P, BCF_max_C2P, 
  BCF_mean_C2P, BCF_sd_C2P
  )

```

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r EPXSummaryResC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| tbl-cap: Results summary
#| tbl-label: tbl-EPXressumC1

Summary_res_EPX_tmp_C1 <- cbind(as.data.frame(MCMC_out_EPX_C1$Summary_res)[1:length(L_parameters_C1)], BCF_C1)

Summary_res_EPX_f_C1 <- Summary_res_EPX_tmp_C1 |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), signif, 2))

Summary_res_EPX_f_C1 |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )

#Summary_res_EPX_f_C1
```

```{r bicC1}
# BIC calculation

LL <- f_get_mode(MCMC_out_EPX_C1$df_LnData$LnData)
n <- length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$Weight)) + length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$CiEPX))
k <- Nb_param_C1 -2

BIC <- -2*LL + k*log(n)

cat("Number of observations, n = ", n,"\nNumber of parameters, k = ", k, "\nLog-likelihood, LL = ", LL, "\nBIC = ", BIC)

```

## C1P

```{r EPXSummaryResC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| tbl-cap: Results summary
#| tbl-label: tbl-EPXressumC1P

Summary_res_EPX_tmp_C1P <- cbind(as.data.frame(MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$Summary_res)[1:length(L_parameters_C1P)], BCF_C1P)

Summary_res_EPX_f_C1P <- Summary_res_EPX_tmp_C1P |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), signif, 2))

Summary_res_EPX_f_C1P |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )

#Summary_res_EPX_f_C1P
```

```{r bicC1P}
# BIC calculation

LL <- f_get_mode(MCMC_out_EPX_C1P$df_LnData$LnData)
n <- length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$Weight)) + length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$CiEPX))
k <- Nb_param_C1P -2

BIC <- -2*LL + k*log(n)

cat("Number of observations, n = ", n,"\nNumber of parameters, k = ", k, "\nLog-likelihood, LL = ", LL, "\nBIC = ", BIC)

```

## C2

```{r EPXSummaryResC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| tbl-cap: Results summary
#| tbl-label: tbl-EPXressumC2

Summary_res_EPX_tmp_C2 <- cbind(as.data.frame(MCMC_out_EPX_C2$Summary_res)[1:length(L_parameters_C2)], BCF_C2)

Summary_res_EPX_f_C2 <- Summary_res_EPX_tmp_C2 |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), signif, 2))

Summary_res_EPX_f_C2 |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )

#Summary_res_EPX_f_C2
```

```{r bicC2}
# BIC calculation

LL <- f_get_mode(MCMC_out_EPX_C2$df_LnData$LnData)
n <- length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$Weight)) + length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$CiEPX))
k <- Nb_param_C2 -2

BIC <- -2*LL + k*log(n)

cat("Number of observations, n = ", n,"\nNumber of parameters, k = ", k, "\nLog-likelihood, LL = ", LL, "\nBIC = ", BIC)

```

## C2P

```{r EPXSummaryResC2P, message=F, warning=F}
#| tbl-cap: Results summary
#| tbl-label: tbl-EPXressumC2P

Summary_res_EPX_tmp_C2P <- cbind(as.data.frame(MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$Summary_res)[1:length(L_parameters_C2P)], BCF_C2P)

Summary_res_EPX_f_C2P <- Summary_res_EPX_tmp_C2P |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), signif, 2))

Summary_res_EPX_f_C2P |> datatable(
  options = list(
    dom = 't',
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
  class="hover"
  )

#Summary_res_EPX_f_C2P
```

```{r bicC2P}
# BIC calculation

LL <- f_get_mode(MCMC_out_EPX_C2P$df_LnData$LnData)
n <- length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$Weight)) + length(na.omit(df_TK_EPX$CiEPX))
k <- Nb_param_C2P -2

BIC <- -2*LL + k*log(n)

cat("Number of observations, n = ", n,"\nNumber of parameters, k = ", k, "\nLog-likelihood, LL = ", LL, "\nBIC = ", BIC)

```
:::

### Comparison of observed vs. predicted data

```{r setpointindin, message=F, warning=F, eval=T}

######### C1 #################################################
l_param_name_C1 <- "kuEPX, keEPX, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_EPX_C1, Molecule, l_param_name_C1)

######### C1P #################################################
l_param_name_C1P <- "kuEPX, keEPX, phi, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_EPX_C1P, Molecule, l_param_name_C1P)

######### C2 #################################################
l_param_name_C2 <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_EPX_C2, Molecule, l_param_name_C2)

######### C2P #################################################
l_param_name_C2P <- "kuEPX, keEPX, kperiph, phi, a_growth"
f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_EPX_C2P, Molecule, l_param_name_C2P)

```

An example of how to run the simulations for the predicted-observed data is given in the bash code block below. You need to be in the right folder to launch a given model.

```{bash, eval=F, execute=F}
pwd
cd ..
cd ..
cd mod/TK_EPX
pwd

for j in $(seq 1 71); do
./mcsim.m_TK_EPX TK_EPX_Setpoint_ind_${j}.in
done
```

```{r EPXdatapred, message=F, warning=F}

Nb_experiment <- Nb_experiment_C1

######### Observed data ######################################################
dObs_ind <- df_TK_EPX |> 
  mutate(
    ID = as.numeric(ID),
    Group_tmp = case_when(
      ID < 65 ~ "Uptake",
      (ID > 64 & ID <= 128) ~ "Elimination",
      ID > 128 ~ "Uptake bis"),
    Group = fct_relevel(Group_tmp, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis"))
    )

colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "Weight"] <- "Weight_obs"
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "CiEPX"] <- "CiEPX_obs"
colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "t"] <- "Times"


############ C1 ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C1 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX_C1, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment_C1){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C1, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C1 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1, Endpt == "CiEPX" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |> 
  left_join(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C1, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiIMD)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |> 
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C1, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiEPX_obs, CiIMD)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C1P ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C1P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX_C1P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C1P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment_C1P){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C1P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C1P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C1P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C1P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C1P, Endpt == "CiEPX" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |> 
  left_join(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C1P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiIMD)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |> 
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C1P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiEPX_obs, CiIMD)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C2 ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C2 <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX_C2, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2 <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment_C2){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C2, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2 <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C2 <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2, Endpt == "CiEPX" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |> 
  left_join(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C2, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiIMD)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2 <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |> 
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C2, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiEPX_obs, CiIMD)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

############ C2P ##############################################################

Sim.Res.ind_C2P <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) {
  read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_EPX_C2P, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>%
    mutate(sim = j)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

df_mod_ind_C2P <- NULL

for (i in 1:Nb_experiment_C2P){
  
  ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i]

  Sim.Res.ind_i  <- subset(Sim.Res.ind_C2P, sim == i) |> 
    dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x))))
  
  dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i)
  
  Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!!
  
  Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiEPX")
  
  Nsortie = 2
  
  MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL
  
  for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){
    
    index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE)

    
    Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] )
    
    MPV    = c(  MPV,  as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) )
    IC_min = c(IC_min,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.025, na.rm=TRUE) )
    IC_max = c(IC_max,  apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile,  0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) 
    
    Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim)))
  }
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame(
    predict.endpoint = MPV,
    Time    = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie),
    low     = IC_min,
    up      = IC_max,
    Endpt   = Endpoint
    )
  
  df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>%
    mutate(ID=ID_i)

  df_mod_ind_C2P <- rbind(df_mod_ind_C2P, df_mod_ind_i)
}

df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0)
df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C2P <- subset(df_mod_ind_C2P, Endpt == "CiEPX" & Time !=0)

df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |> 
  left_join(df_mod_CiEPX_ind_C2P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiIMD)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P <- dObs_ind |> 
  filter(Time !=0) |> 
  left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind_C2P, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|>
  dplyr::select(-c(CiEPX_obs, CiIMD)) |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> 
  drop_na()

```

```{r rmse, message=F, warning=F}
RMSE_C1 <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1$CiEPX_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C1) = ", RMSE_C1)

RMSE_C1P <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P$CiEPX_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C1P) = ", RMSE_C1P)

RMSE_C2 <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2$CiEPX_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C2) = ", RMSE_C2)

RMSE_C2P <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2P$CiEPX_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2P$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2P$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE))
cat("RMSE(C2P) = ", RMSE_C2P)
```

::: panel-tabset
## C1

```{r predobsEPXC1, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-EPXpredobsC1
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])
shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)
# "#BF616A" "#A3BE8C" "#B48EAD"

lim_min <-  min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight)
lim_max <- max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight)
seq_line <- seq(lim_min, lim_max, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_EPX
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)-0.05,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)-0.05,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(lim_min, lim_max))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(lim_min, lim_max))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 1000

p_CiEPX_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiEPX_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_EPX
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1$CiEPX_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of EPX\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of EPX\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(1, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(1, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiEPX_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobs_C1, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_EPX_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1
)
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_EPX_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1
)
```

```{r countfoldEPXC1, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1 <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1 <- df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiEPX_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiEPX_obs
  )

CiEPX_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiEPX_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1$CiEPX_obs) * 100

CiEPX_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiEPX_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1$CiEPX_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5, 1), "%"
)
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiEPX_count_fold2, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiEPX_count_fold5, 1), "%"
)
```

## C1P

```{r predobsEPXC1P, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-EPXpredobsC1P
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])
shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)
# "#BF616A" "#A3BE8C" "#B48EAD"

lim_min <-  min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight)
lim_max <- max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight)
seq_line <- seq(lim_min, lim_max, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_EPX
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint)-0.05,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint)-0.05,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(lim_min, lim_max))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(lim_min, lim_max))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 1000

p_CiEPX_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiEPX_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_EPX
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P$CiEPX_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of EPX\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of EPX\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(1, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(1, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiEPX_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobs_C1P, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_EPX_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1P
)
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_EPX_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C1P
)
```

```{r countfoldEPXC1P, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C1P$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P <- df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiEPX_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiEPX_obs
  )

CiEPX_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiEPX_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P$CiEPX_obs) * 100

CiEPX_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiEPX_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C1P$CiEPX_obs) * 100

cat(
  "For weights : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5, 1), "%"
)
cat(
  "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiEPX_count_fold2, 1), "%\n",
  "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiEPX_count_fold5, 1), "%"
)
```

## C2

```{r predobsEPXC2, message=F, warning=F}
#| fig-cap: Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line. 
#| label: fig-EPXpredobsC2
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 8

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1]
col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4]
col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1]

col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[5])
shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX)
# "#BF616A" "#A3BE8C" "#B48EAD"

lim_min <-  min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight)
lim_max <- max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight)
seq_line <- seq(lim_min, lim_max, 0.001)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

p_W <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2,
  mapping = aes(
      x = Weight_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up
    ),
    alpha = 0.5,
    color = col_EPX
  )+
  xlim(
    xmin = min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)-0.05,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = min(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)-0.05,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  scale_x_log10(limits=c(lim_min, lim_max))+
  scale_y_log10(limits=c(lim_min, lim_max))+
  labs(
    x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)",
    y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)"
  )+
  theme_minimal()

fact_1 <- 2
fact_2 <- 5

seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01)

df_line <- data.frame(
  x1  = seq_line,
  y1  = seq_line*fact_1,
  x_1 = seq_line,
  y_1 = seq_line/fact_1,
  x2  = seq_line,
  y2  = seq_line*fact_2,
  x_2 = seq_line,
  y_2 = seq_line/fact_2
  )

lim_plot <- 1000

p_CiEPX_predobs <- ggplot(
  data = df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2,
  mapping = aes(
      x = CiEPX_obs,
      y = predict.endpoint
    )
  )+
  geom_path(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1),
    color = col_line1
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_line(
    data=df_line,
    mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2),
    color = col_line2
    )+
  geom_abline(
    slope=1, 
    intercept = 0, 
    color = col_line0,
    linewidth = 1
    )+
  geom_pointrange(
    mapping = aes(
      ymin = low,
      ymax = up,
      color = Group,
      shape = Group
    ),
    alpha = 0.5#,
    #color = col_EPX
  )+
  
  xlim(
    xmin = 0.5,
    xmax = max(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2$CiEPX_obs)
  )+
  ylim(
    ymin = 0.5,
    ymax = max(df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2$predict.endpoint)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "Observed concentrations of EPX\nin earthworms (ng/g)",
    y = "Predicted concentrations of EPX\nin earthworms (ng/g)"
  )+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = col_exposure_bis
    )+
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+
  scale_x_log10(
    limits=c(1, lim_plot)
    )+
  scale_y_log10(
    limits=c(1, lim_plot)
    )+
  theme_minimal()

p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiEPX_predobs
p_predobs

```

```{r savepredobs_C2, include = F}
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_EPX_predobs.png",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2
)
ggsave(
  filename = "TK_EPX_predobs.svg",
  plot = p_predobs,
  width = 8, height = 4,
  path = path_fig_C2
)
```

```{r countfoldEPXC2, warning=F}

df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2 <- df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs
  )

Weight_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight_obs) * 100

Weight_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind_C2$Weight_obs) * 100

df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2 <- df_predobs_CiEPX_ind_C2 |>
  mutate(
    Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiEPX_obs,
    Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiEPX_obs
  )
```
